sentences.translation: Porodica se probudila i jela doručak zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: The family woke up and ate breakfast together.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ خُبْزٌ وَجُبْنٌ وَبَيْضٌ.
sentences.translation: Na stolu je bio hljeb, sir i jaja.
sentences.translationEn: On the table there was bread, cheese, and eggs.

sentences.translation: Svi su pili čaj sa mlijekom.
Doručak je bio jednostavan ali lijep.
sentences.translationEn: The breakfast was simple but lovely.
